title: sabulina litorea
intro: Sabulina litorea, also known as sea purslane or sea pursley, is a succulent plant that grows in coastal areas and is characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Sabulina litorea include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Sabulina litorea often involve infusions, decoctions, or salves made from the leaves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and minor injuries.
